_about: Wild-encounter roster reference data - generated 2026-07-06 from the pinned
Tuxemon clone (commit c34a9c72) + CONTENT_REFERENCE.md section 16. NOT loaded by the
game. ourTypeProposed uses section 16's remap table, which is still [TO CONFIRM]
with Lewis. descriptions are Tuxemon project text (CC, credit Tuxemon).
Player-facing names come from Lewis's rename pass, area by area - slugs are

aardorn.description: When born it is placed in an anthill and left to eat its way out.

brachifor.description: BRACHIFOR can go without eating if it stays perfectly still.

brumi.description: Neglected brooms may be stolen by BRUMI.

bursa.description: It rejects fire as basic, and produces only the fire of the mind.

cardiling.description: One wouldn't expect it to breathe fire, until it does.

cardiwing.description: Its song is remarkable, but few dare keep an explosive songbird.

chenipode.description: It bites onto shoelaces and trouser legs when it wants to travel.

coaldiak.description: This bear can set fire to anywhere and draw blood from anything.

corvix.description: It arms its wings with bone shards from its victims.

dracune.description: It is immobile during the day, but can wriggle and bite at night.

embazook.description: It is trained for use in war and it knows no other life.

embra.description: It eats everything it can to grow big enough to become a RUPTION.

eruptibus.description: Smiths work with it, heating up metals in its caldera.

eskipup.description: Even as a puppy, it can pull 1 ton loads.

eyenemy.description: It feeds on beautiful views and other spectacular sights.

fordin.description: When threatened, it curls into a ball and bounces away.

forturtle.description: It heats its shell to read the future from the cracks that emerge.

frostuce.description: One rarely expects to see green waltzing around in a snowstorm.

galasces.description: GALASCES can distort its shape to engulf prey its own size.

gectile.description: It is so quick and light that it can walk on leaves.

grimachin.description: It was made by a toy company to be a pet, but was too dangerous.

grinflare.description: It is said that each is the walking heart of a volcano.

grintot.description: It is a GRINTROCK or GRINFLARE that has experienced erosion.

gryfix.description: Bone armor protects GRYFIX from all but the most powerful of attacks.

hoarse.description: It appears to be a farm animal, but it was mistreated by its owner.

hoarseshoo.description: It is what is left when an EQUILL's shadow eats its body.

hydrone.description: It utilizes an experimental technology that creates power from water.

knindling.description: Any spark from a stone KNINDLING happily tenders into a fire.

legko.description: Long thought to be legless, its leaves are actually vestigial limbs.

lettice.description: Cold weather concentrates the power and vitality of LETTICE.

moloch.description: It can stiffen or soften its skin to respond to friends and foes.

ninjasmine.description: NINJASMINE poisons his opponents quickly using his two poison swords.

nostray.description: It can smell anything in the ocean, no matter how far away.

nudimind.description: It dreams of oceans under other skies.

pigabyte.description: Scientists found that the best computers have organic implants.

pipis.description: Its cries are considered a bad omen, but it is a gentle creature.

possessun.description: It is a ghost that inhabits a dead CAIRFREY.

primordia.description: It is rumored to be the ancestor of all tuxemon.

prophetoise.description: Its heavenly fire is something foes rarely see coming.

regalance.description: It can summon a halberd whenever it needs.

rockat.description: Despite its considerable weight, its footfalls are silent.

rockitten.description: It uses its tiny rock ears for snuggling.

rosarin.description: ROSARIN's love is incredible, he's only asking some affection.

scarlant.description: Its worst enemy is MARVILLAR, which pretends to be its kin.

snowrilla.description: It delights in playing tag with skiers on desolate slopes.

sprorm.description: SPRORM is fed on by CARDINALE, which can melt it down.

strella.description: Its tails are lures to convince bugs to bite them and be trapped.

vamporm.description: It thirsts for blood, but must make do with tree sap.

velocitile.description: It can outrun a bullet, but only when it has warmed up.

weavifly.description: When it is heavy with egg, it becomes unable to fly.

wolololl.description: WOLOLOLL's sharp spines are tipped with a deadly venom.
